nodes.title: [GH-40] Update to gradlew 8.14.5
nodes.body: We should keep the gradle version up to date, even while we can't update the major version.

nodes.title: [GH-39] Add TimeSource that returns zero
nodes.body: Currently, there are two time sources, that use `System.nanoTime` and `System.currentTimeMillis`. To measure there overhead, a `ZeroTimeSource` should be created that only returns 0 (and therefore creates no overhead).

nodes.title: [GH-38] Non-deterministic Failure of release-check-extended.sh
[GH-37] Add test cases for the new PlantUML-based Trace Analysis
nodes.body: We have incorporated the PlantUML pipeline into Trace Analysis, but this lacks test cases in the `release-check-extended.sh`. We would at least need the same set of test cases for the new Trace Analysis.

nodes.title: [GH-36] Uncomplete Example Command in Quick Start Guide
nodes.body:
In the [Quick Start Guide](https://kieker-monitoring.readthedocs.io/en/2.0.3/quick-start-guide.html) looks it like `bin\trace-analysis.bat ... --plot-Assembly-Component-Dependency-Graph` would not need a parameter. Meanwhile it actually needs one, i. e. `responseTimes-ns`.

Also it can be misleading for new user that it is not mentioned that `trace-analysis` is a tool in the tool directory. The current guide can actually be read in such a way that `trace-analysis.bat` is in the same `bin`-directory as `dotPic-fileConverter.bat`.

nodes.title: [GH-34] More hard-coded version names
nodes.body:
There are three `gradle.properties` files that are not affected by the Gradle task `replaceHardCodedVersionNames()` in `./build.gradle`

```sh
monitoring/aspectj/integrationTest-resources/example-projects-aspectj/example-beforeafterconstructorevent/gradle.properties
monitoring/aspectj/integrationTest-resources/example-projects-aspectj/example-beforeafteroperationevent/gradle.properties
monitoring/aspectj/integrationTest-resources/example-projects-aspectj/example-operationexecutionrecord/gradle.properties
```

nodes.title: [GH-33] Use Static Initializer for ByteBuddy Variables
nodes.body: Instead of initializing variables in `if`-blocks, they should be initialized by a static initializer. Before merging this, we should check whether this influences the performance.

nodes.title: [GH-32] Update to Gradle 8.14.4.
nodes.body: While we're waiting for the release issue to be resolved for a major Gradle version update, we should still update the patch version, so we should go to 8.14.4 (which shouldn't break anything).

nodes.title: [GH-28] New Plantuml pipeline for visualization
nodes.body:
Integrate a new plantuml pipeline in trace analysis for creating diagrams. 

- For sequence diagrams we use plantuml syntax now, before it was PIC. 
- For other diagrams it was DOT, but now uses the integrated GraphVIZ engine from plantuml.

nodes.title: [GH-21] Refactorization of new Trace-Analysis
nodes.body: Refactor the old trace analysis. Create a common folder for trace-analysis and move it into the existing source folder of trace analysis.

nodes.title: [GH-17] Snapshot Publishing Failure
nodes.body:
The main branch has been failing to upload snapshots to the maven repository.

```
> Task :publishMavenJavaPublicationToMavenRepository FAILED

[Incubating] Problems report is available at: file:///home/jenkins-agent/workspace/kieker-dev_main@2/build/reports/problems/problems-report.html

FAILURE: Build failed with an exception.

* What went wrong:
Execution failed for task ':publishMavenJavaPublicationToMavenRepository'.
> Failed to publish publication 'mavenJava' to repository 'maven'
   > Could not PUT 'https://oss.sonatype.org/content/repositories/snapshots/net/kieker-monitoring/kieker/2.0.3-SNAPSHOT/kieker-2.0.3-20250722.074848-194.jar'. Received status code 403 from server: Forbidden
```

nodes.title: [GH-10] Fix Release Process
nodes.body:
The release has a problem with signing again (see https://build.se.informatik.uni-kiel.de/view/Kieker/job/kieker-dev/job/2.0.3-RC/):

```
* What went wrong:
Execution failed for task ':publishMavenJavaPublicationToMavenLocal'.
> Failed to publish publication 'mavenJava' to repository 'mavenLocal'
   > Invalid publication 'mavenJava': artifact file does not exist: '/home/jenkins-agent/workspace/kieker-dev_2.0.3-RC@3/build/publications/mavenJava/pom-default.xml.asc'
```

This will require some debugging again.
